topPlaces.name: Loma (Jandaha)
topPlaces.description: Loma is a village in the Jandaha block of Vaishali district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is located more than 30 km from the nearest city of Hajipur.

topPlaces.name: Banbira
topPlaces.description: Banbira, or Banvira, is a village in Bihar, India. It is located in Morwa Tehsil of Samastipur District.

topPlaces.name: Arnia (village)
topPlaces.description: Arnia (Maithili: अरनिया) also written as Arniya is a village in the Jandaha block of the Vaishali district in the Mithila region of the Bihar state in India. It is connected by the National Highway 322 with the other part of the country.

topPlaces.name: Hazrat Jandaha
topPlaces.description: Hazrat Jandaha, also commonly called Jandaha, is a town in the Vaishali district of the Indian state of Bihar .

topPlaces.name: Jandaha
topPlaces.description: Jandaha is a block in Vaishali district, Bihar state, According to the census website, all blocks in Bihar state nomenclature as C.D. Block (community development blocks). Jandaha Jandaha (Vidhan Sabha constituency) (Hindi: जन्दाहा विधान सभा निर्वाचन क्षेत्र) was an assembly constituency in Vaishali district in the Indian state of Bihar.

Hazrat Jandaha, also commonly called Jandaha, is a town in the Vaishali district of the Indian state of Bihar .

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Barela Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Barela Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Barela Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (53 km) and the nearest railway station is Muzaffarpur Junction (44 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Barela Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Barela Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Barela Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Barela Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Barela Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Loma (Jandaha), Banbira, Arnia (village), Hazrat Jandaha, Jandaha.
